category_sources: source_facts.description says chars is a command-line tool for displaying information about Unicode characters.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chars and source_facts.homepage is the official chars repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Unicode character information; source_facts.executables lists chars.
